problem id: 7b4ac17a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  10000000 -> 11111101
  01001010 -> 01110110
  01100110 -> 00000110
  01010101 -> 11111010
  10001011 -> 01100001
  00011100 -> 01001111
  01101101 -> 10011010
  10001100 -> 00001101
  11000110 -> 10000101

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 11010101
